title: Rearmed: Spartan Weaponry Retexture
description: A retexture of the mod Spartan Weaponry by ObliviousSpartan
body:
A resource pack that changes the textures of the mod [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry) by ObliviousSpartan.

I like playing with the Spartan Weaponry mod, but I always thought the texture left a little to be desired, especially in modern versions. This pack updates the textures for all of the vanilla and modded weapons added by the base Spartan Weaponry mod, as well as most of the miscellaneous items.

Currently unfinished are the quivers and arrow textures, and I aim to improve some of the entity textures or models. I also plan on making sister packs for Spartan Shields and for certain Spartan Weaponry addons.

Feel free to use this texture pack however you please as long as I am credited.
